chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-230 of 2026 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 25.03.2026 Mr. Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocate for petitioner Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant A.G Sindh a/w Ghulam Qadir CMO MC Khairpur ************** Mr. Mir Bux Shar, Advocate, has filed a vakalatnama on behalf of the respondents, Municipal Committee Khairpur; the same is taken on record. He has also submitted a statement/compliance report, which is likewise taken on record. A copy thereof has been provided to the counsel for the petitioner for examination. After submission of the statement, counsel for the Municipal Committee Khairpur seeks disposal of the present petition, submitting that an amount of Rs.9,59,978/- remains outstanding and the same shall be paid to the petitioner in monthly installments of Rs.200,000/-. Upon this, counsel for the petitioner expresses satisfaction, but requests that the monthly installment be enhanced from Rs.200,000/- to Rs. 250,000/-. Counsel for the respondents, Municipal Committee Khairpur, agrees to the said proposal and undertakes that a monthly installment of Rs.250,000/- shall be paid towards the remaining amount until full payment/regularization. In view of the above, the instant constitutional petition is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E M.Ali*
